parties.name: EV KING LIVING, DATED MAY 1, 2003, AS RESTATED ON 10/10/2006

calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Modifying Trust
Off Calendar Sep-25-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Carolyn Espey for Tommy King (Petitioner/Trustee).

Ms. Espey stated that she hasn't been able to get further consent from Carlos, that she has communicated with the Mom, that she mailed two letters and that he never contacted her. Ms. Espey also suggested taking the matter off calendar rather than issuing an order. In light of Carlos' decision not to consent to a change intended for his benefit, the Petition for Order Modifying Trust is denied without prejudice to the Parties coming back with a later petition. Ms. Espey will provide a form of order.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Petition For Order Modifying Trust

Petition For Order Modifying Trust
Off Calendar Jun-26-2018 Continued To Jul-17-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Carolyn Espey for Tommy King (Trustee).

The Court questions venue. Ms. Espey stated that the Trustee issues checks from the account at Edward Jones in San Francisco, that when he needs to pay bills for the house, he comes here to get a cashier's check, that he does not have a checking account, that the Trust consist of real property and the Edward Jones account, and that it is owned by all of the Siblings. Ms. Espey also stated that she is not aware of any administration in Vallejo, and that the Trustee relies on her and the Investment Managers at Edward Jones. The Court stated that it appears venue is proper here (San Francisco) versus Solano County and informed Ms. Espey that a consent from Carlos Cornelius is needed. The Petition for Order Modifying Trust is continued to July 17, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
